headline: Trial Set in NEC Multidistrict Litigation Against Reckitt Benckiser’s Mead Johnson Led by Levin Papantonio
summary: LONDON & PENSACOLA, Fla., March 05, 2026--Reckitt Benckiser (LON: RKT) subsidiary Mead Johnson is facing a bellwether trial in the US Multidistrict Litigation (MDL) over infant formula product Enfamil linked to necrotizing enterocolitis (NEC) scheduled for 6 July 2026. NEC is a severe intestinal disease that can cause tissue death and life-threatening infections in premature babies. Levin Papantonio attorney Andy Childers is Plaintiffs’ Co-Lead Counsel in the MDL.
